judgeReasoning: The response satisfies all required rubric points: it explains that `group` organizes navigation, llms.txt sections, search metadata, and AGENTS.md grouping; it clearly characterizes `/llms-full.txt` as a monolithic all-docs fallback that is NOT split by group; and it lists many valid optional frontmatter fields (icon, deprecated, experimental, canary, new, draft, tags, full, lastModified, lastAuthor).
